evals.prompt: Train a model to extract building footprints from aerial imagery tiles.
expected_behavior: U-Net with pretrained encoder + Dice/CE hybrid for class imbalance
Spatially blocked split per the canonical spatial CV protocol, zero-overlap verified
Preserves chip georeferencing; sliding-window inference with overlap and blending

evals.prompt: I randomly split my image chips 80/20 and get 0.95 IoU. Ready to publish?
expected_behavior: Identifies spatial leakage from random chip splitting
Requires re-splitting by geographic block/scene and expects lower, honest metrics

evals.prompt: Should I use a vision transformer for classifying water pixels in Sentinel-2?
expected_behavior: Requires a cheap baseline (thresholded NDWI / random forest) before deep models
Frames the DL model as justified only if it clearly beats the baseline
